description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow set on a large rectangular green plot, surrounded by a variety of trees and shrubs. The building features a flat roof and a clean, geometric layout with large windows and open spaces. A swimming pool is visible adjacent to the main structure, along with paved walkways and a small patio area. The exterior walls are primarily light-colored, likely finished in stucco or concrete, with some glass elements for the windows and doors. The landscaping is lush, with dense foliage providing privacy and a natural aesthetic. The overall design emphasizes openness, natural light, and integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern, flat-roofed single-story bungalow with large windows, a pool, and lush landscaping on a spacious green plot.
description_view_0: The bungalow is seen from above and at an angle, showing the full layout, pool, and surrounding trees.
description_view_1: A head-on view of the front facade, highlighting the entrance, front windows, and dense landscaping.
description_view_2: A rear angled view, emphasizing the back of the bungalow, pool area, and more secluded garden space.
description_view_3: A direct rear view, focusing on the back entrance, pool, and patio area with visible landscaping.
